use_codes.desc: NON-BENZODIAZEPINE HYPNOTIC AGENT INDICATED FOR TREATMENT OF INSOMNIA, CHARACTERIZED BY DIFFICULTIES WITH SLEEP ONSET AND/OR SLEEP MAINTENANCE

indications.text:
Ambien CR (zolpidem tartrate extended-release tablets) is indicated for the treatment of
insomnia characterized by difficulties with sleep onset and/or sleep maintenance (as measured by
wake time after sleep onset).
The clinical trials performed in support of efficacy were up to 3 weeks (using polys...

AMBIEN (zolpidem tartrate) is indicated for the short-term treatment of insomnia characterized
by difficulties with sleep initiation. AMBIEN has been shown to decrease sleep latency for up to
35 days in controlled clinical studies [see Clinical Studies (14)].
